social_media_video_templates.title: TikTok Dance Challenge - Beat-Synced Viral Moves
social_media_video_templates.description: High-energy dance video with perfect beat synchronization, trending audio integration, and viral-optimized movements designed for maximum engagement and duet potential

prompt_structure.scene: Vibrant LED-lit studio with color-changing backdrop synced to beat, professional ring light setup creating dramatic shadows, mirrors for depth
prompt_structure.subject: Energetic dancer in trending streetwear (oversized hoodie, cargo pants, fresh sneakers), age 18-25, diverse representation
prompt_structure.action: 8-count choreography with signature moves at 0:00-0:03, beat drops at 0:07, 0:15, 0:23, hand gestures emphasizing lyrics, facial expressions matching energy
prompt_structure.camera: Dynamic handheld movements, crash zooms on beat drops, 360-degree spins during transitions, slight Dutch angles for energy
prompt_structure.effects: Speed ramps (0.5x to 2x), freeze frames with motion blur trails, RGB split on impacts, particle effects on key moves, seamless loop point

engagement_elements.hook: Signature move in first 2.5 seconds with visual effect

social_media_video_templates.title: Instagram Reels Transition - Outfit Changes & Seamless Cuts
social_media_video_templates.description: Visually stunning transition reel showcasing multiple outfit changes with perfectly aligned cuts, trending audio synchronization, and save-worthy aesthetic appeal

prompt_structure.scene: Minimalist backdrop (white cyclorama or textured wall), consistent lighting setup with key light at 45°, subtle colored gel accents
prompt_structure.subject: Fashion-forward model, consistent pose between transitions, 5-7 distinct outfits from casual to formal
prompt_structure.action: Hand swipe transitions, 360° spins, jump cuts, fabric toss reveals, snap transitions on beat
prompt_structure.camera: Locked tripod position, identical framing for each shot, subtle zoom for emphasis, rule of thirds composition
prompt_structure.effects: Match cuts on movement, whip pan transitions, digital glitch effects, time remapping, color grade shifts per outfit

engagement_elements.hook: All outfits preview in rapid 2-second montage

social_media_video_templates.title: YouTube Shorts Hook - First 3 Seconds Grab & Value Proposition
social_media_video_templates.description: High-retention short-form content with aggressive hook, clear value proposition, and rapid information delivery optimized for YouTube Shorts algorithm

prompt_structure.scene: Professional studio with branded background, clear graphics space, good acoustic treatment
prompt_structure.subject: Authoritative presenter with dynamic energy, direct eye contact, professional but approachable appearance
prompt_structure.action: Aggressive opening statement, rapid-fire tips with hand gestures, prop demonstrations, B-roll cutaways
prompt_structure.camera: Subtle push-ins for emphasis, crash zooms on key points, handheld energy, centered framing
prompt_structure.effects: Kinetic typography, progress bars, numbered lists, highlight animations, end screen elements

social_media_video_templates.title: LinkedIn Career Tips - Professional Authority Building
social_media_video_templates.description: Executive-level career advice video with professional production values, establishing thought leadership and driving meaningful business connections

prompt_structure.scene: Modern office environment or professional home office, bokeh background, subtle branding elements, clean desk setup
prompt_structure.subject: Business professional in appropriate attire (business casual to formal), confident posture, 35-55 age range
prompt_structure.action: Direct to camera address, whiteboard illustrations, screen share demos, hand gestures for emphasis
prompt_structure.camera: Stable tripod, eye-level angle, professional depth of field, slight movement for dynamism
prompt_structure.effects: Professional lower thirds, data visualization overlays, subtle transitions, corporate motion graphics

engagement_elements.cta: Connect for more insights, comment with experiences

social_media_video_templates.title: Pinterest DIY Tutorial - Overhead Process Shots
social_media_video_templates.description: Aesthetically perfect DIY tutorial with overhead photography, step-by-step process visualization, and Pinterest-optimized styling for maximum saves

prompt_structure.scene: Bright, styled workspace with marble/wood surface, organized supplies, natural lighting from window, Pinterest-worthy props
prompt_structure.subject: Hands only (manicured), minimal jewelry, working on craft/recipe/DIY project
prompt_structure.action: Clear step-by-step progression, before/after reveals, satisfying process shots, material close-ups
prompt_structure.camera: Overhead rig primary, 45° angle for dimension, macro shots for detail, smooth transitions between angles
prompt_structure.effects: Soft fades between steps, text overlays for ingredients/supplies, time-lapse sections, gentle zoom reveals

engagement_elements.hook: Stunning final result in first 3 seconds

social_media_video_templates.title: Twitter Video Thread - Breaking News Style Updates
social_media_video_templates.description: Rapid-fire news-style video optimized for Twitter threads, designed for viral potential with quick updates and shareable moments

prompt_structure.scene: News desk setup or on-location with relevant background, urgency in environment, mobile journalism aesthetic
prompt_structure.subject: Presenter with urgent delivery, authentic reactions, citizen journalist or expert commentator vibe
prompt_structure.action: Direct address to camera, quick cuts to evidence/B-roll, hand-held urgency, real-time updates
prompt_structure.camera: Handheld for authenticity, quick pans to action, crash zooms for emphasis, documentary style
prompt_structure.effects: Breaking news lower thirds, timestamp overlays, quote graphics, evidence highlights, thread indicators

social_media_video_templates.title: Facebook Live Shopping - Product Demo & Engagement
social_media_video_templates.description: Interactive live shopping video with product demonstrations, real-time engagement features, and conversion-optimized presentation

prompt_structure.scene: Bright studio or boutique setting, products displayed professionally, live shopping setup with good lighting
prompt_structure.subject: Enthusiastic host/seller, authentic personality, product expert knowledge, friendly demeanor
prompt_structure.action: Product demonstrations, feature highlights, size/color options, real-time Q&A simulation
prompt_structure.camera: Multiple angles - wide for context, close-ups for detail, handheld for energy
prompt_structure.effects: Price overlays, countdown timers, stock indicators, special offer banners, comment integration

engagement_elements.hook: Limited time offer or exclusive deal

social_media_video_templates.title: Snapchat AR Filter Demo - Face Tracking & Interactive Elements
social_media_video_templates.description: Engaging AR filter demonstration showcasing face tracking technology, interactive elements, and viral-worthy transformations

prompt_structure.scene: Various backgrounds to show filter versatility, good lighting for face tracking, fun environments
prompt_structure.subject: Expressive user demonstrating filter features, diverse age/ethnicity representation
prompt_structure.action: Face movements triggering animations, hand gestures for interactions, expression changes, head turns
prompt_structure.camera: Front-facing camera view, slight movements to show tracking stability, zoom for detail
prompt_structure.effects: 3D face filters, environmental AR, particle effects, sound-reactive elements, multiplayer features

social_media_video_templates.title: BeReal Authentic Moment - Dual Camera Unfiltered Reality
social_media_video_templates.description: Raw, unfiltered moment capture using dual camera perspective, emphasizing authenticity and real-time spontaneity

prompt_structure.scene: Everyday location - office, home, street, cafe - completely unplanned and natural
prompt_structure.subject: Person in their natural state, no preparation, genuine expressions and reactions
prompt_structure.action: Whatever they're actually doing - working, eating, commuting, relaxing
prompt_structure.camera: Simultaneous dual view - main camera showing environment, front camera showing face

social_media_video_templates.title: Threads Visual Discussion - Thought-Provoking Dialogue Starter
social_media_video_templates.description: Conversation-starting video designed to spark meaningful discussions in Threads' text-forward environment

prompt_structure.scene: Clean, minimalist background that doesn't distract from message, possibly abstract or artistic
prompt_structure.subject: Thoughtful presenter or visual metaphor/animation representing the concept
prompt_structure.action: Deliberate pacing, pauses for thought, gestures that emphasize points, visual storytelling
prompt_structure.camera: Static or slow movements, intimate framing, focus on message not production
prompt_structure.effects: Elegant text overlays, simple but meaningful graphics, thought bubbles, quote highlights
